data.title: Decentralized contract trading platform Sun Wukong launches MU and TSM perpetual contracts
data.description: According to official social media reports, the Chinese decentralized contract trading platform Sun Wukong has now listed MU/USDT and TSM/USDT, with a maximum leverage of 10x for both.

data.title: Ondo Finance Introduces Proxy Voting for Tokenized Securities
data.description: Ondo Finance has implemented proxy voting for over 250 tokenized securities on its platform, which manages more than $700 million in tokenized stocks and ETF tokens. According to NS3.AI, this new feature utilizes Broadridge's ProxyVote system, enabling wallet users to examine company filings and express their voting preferences. While the tokens do not provide direct shareholder rights, Ondo Finance can incorporate investor preferences when voting on the underlying shares it possesses.

data.title: Blockchain Association Supports Fed Proposal to Remove 'Reputation Risk' from Bank Supervision
data.description: The Blockchain Association has expressed support for a Federal Reserve proposal aimed at formally eliminating 'reputation risk' from bank supervision. According to NS3.AI, Ashok Pinto emphasized that the change, set for June 2025, should be codified to ensure its permanence across different administrations, preventing its use to debank lawful cryptocurrency firms. Pinto further suggested that the Federal Reserve should align any final rule with similar regulations finalized by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) on April 7.

data.title: BTC Short Positions Leveraged 20x by Major Bearish Trader
data.description:
On April 28, a significant bearish trader on the Bitcoin blockchain initiated a 20x leveraged short position involving 300 BTC. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the position is valued at approximately $23 million, with an average price of $76,612 per BTC.

The trader, identified by the address 0x004, has been consistently opening short positions since the beginning of the month, totaling 16 times. Currently, nine consecutive positions have been profitable, with an average holding duration of about 21 hours.

data.title: LayerZero Team Wallet Transfers ZRO Tokens to CEX
data.description:
On April 28, a wallet associated with the LayerZero team deposited 1 million ZRO tokens into a centralized exchange (CEX), according to BlockBeats On-chain Detection. The tokens are valued at approximately $1.43 million.

The wallet still holds 29 million ZRO tokens, valued at around $41.34 million, and may continue transferring tokens to trading platforms. The wallet address is 0x1f903473376fbe98cc763f1bc459c8fdb6ac3909.

data.title: Ondo: Its tokenized shares will soon have shareholder governance and voting functions.
data.description: Ondo Finance announced on its X platform that it has partnered with Broadridge, a provider of issuer communication services for retail and institutional investors. This partnership will enable holders of over 250 tokenized stocks and ETFs under Ondo to access investor information and participate in proxy voting. Tokenized stock investors will enjoy the advantages of on-chain trading while also participating in the underlying securities governance of the world's largest stock and ETF portfolio.

data.title: Data: The top 3 CEXs by XAU contract trading volume in the past 24 hours are Binance, Bitget, and OKX.
data.description: According to CoinGlass data, XAU is currently trading at $4,634.97, down 1.71% in the last 24 hours. Affected by market volatility, the total trading volume of XAU contracts across all exchanges reached $1.669 billion in the last 24 hours, a 124.91% increase compared to the previous period. Among centralized exchanges, liquidity is mainly concentrated on Binance, Bitget, and OKX, with their 24-hour contract trading volumes ranking in the top three at $959 million, $273 million, and $143 million respectively.

data.title: Ondo Finance Partners with Broadridge to Enhance Tokenized Stockholder Services
data.description: Ondo Finance has announced a collaboration with Broadridge, a provider of issuer communication services for retail and institutional investors. According to Odaily, this partnership will enable holders of over 250 tokenized stocks and ETFs under Ondo to access investor information and participate in proxy voting. Investors in tokenized stocks will benefit from on-chain trading advantages while engaging in governance of the underlying securities of the world's largest stocks and ETFs.

data.title: French Company Capital B ALCPB Increases Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: French publicly traded company Capital B ALCPB has acquired an additional 6 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 2,943 bitcoins. According to Odaily, this purchase adds to the company's existing cryptocurrency portfolio.

data.title: The LayerZero team deposited 1 million ZRO tokens into Binance via their linked wallet, maintaining a total holding of 29 million ZRO tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the LayerZero team's associated wallet (0x1f9034...3909) deposited 1 million ZRO tokens, worth $1.43 million, into Binance. The wallet still holds 29 million ZRO tokens, worth $41.34 million, and further deposits are expected.

data.title: French listed company Capital B ALCPB increased its holdings by 6 BTC, bringing its total holdings to 2943 BTC.
data.description: French listed company Capital B ALCPB purchased an additional 6 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 2,943. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: Lista DAO's locked-up contract distributed 7.023 million LISTA tokens to one address, representing approximately 2% of its total circulating supply.
data.description: A few minutes ago, the Arkham-tagged Lista DAO core lock-up contract (Vote-escrowed Lista) transferred funds to address 0xFEf45b8B5C52f442a8f866f8Ea9A10c4C739BF36. This address received approximately 7.023 million LISTA tokens, worth about $616,800. Previously, this address would transfer LISTA tokens to a Binance deposit address after receiving them. Currently, the circulating supply of LISTA is 354.15M, and the amount received by this address represents approximately 1.98% of its total circulating supply. LISTA is currently trading at $0.08722, up 3.04% in the last 24 hours, with a circulating market capitalization of approximately $30.88 million.

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor on Potential Hormuz Strait Closure Impact
data.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda stated that any decision regarding interest rate hikes in the event of a Hormuz Strait closure would depend on inflation risks and the economic situation. According to Jin10, Ueda emphasized that the central bank's policy decisions are closely tied to prevailing economic conditions and inflationary pressures.

data.title: Privy Introduces Advanced API Wallet Actions for Streamlined Blockchain Operations
data.description: Privy, a privacy wallet infrastructure platform, has announced the launch of its advanced API Wallet Actions. According to Foresight News, this new feature is designed to simplify common on-chain operations such as transfers, swaps, and yield earning. Developers can now utilize a single endpoint, allowing Privy to automatically manage transaction construction, execution, and cross-chain gas fee payments.

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda: Real Interest Rates Remain Negative After Last Year's Rate Hike
data.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda stated that despite the interest rate hike in December last year, real interest rates remain negative. According to Jin10, Ueda believes that the current financial environment is still accommodative.

data.title: Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center Data Breach Affects Over 800,000 Individuals
data.description: Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center has reported a data breach impacting 813,892 individuals. According to NS3.AI, the breach, which occurred in September 2024, involved unauthorized access to sensitive information. The compromised data may include Social Security numbers, financial account details, health insurance information, and medical records. The university is currently addressing the situation and working to enhance its security measures to prevent future incidents.

data.title: Elon Musk's Lawsuit Against OpenAI: Polymarket Predicts Outcome
data.description:
According to Odaily, Polymarket has introduced a new event titled 'Elon Musk Wins at Least $10 Billion Settlement from Altman/OpenAI.' Currently, the probability of a 'Yes' outcome is 14%.

The contract rules state that by 11:59 PM on December 31, 2026, Eastern Time, if Elon Musk's lawsuit against Altman (case number: 4:24-cv-04722-YGR, U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California) results in a jury verdict, court judgment, or settlement awarding at least $10 billion in cash or equivalent compensation, the market will settle as 'Yes.' Otherwise, it will settle as 'No.' If the case is dismissed, the initial trial does not meet the compensation threshold, or the compensation is non-monetary, it will be determined as 'No.' Retrials and appeals are not considered in this market. The primary basis for judgment will be official information from the U.S. court system, supplemented by consensus reports from credible media.

The lawsuit filed by Elon Musk against OpenAI commenced on April 27, with jury selection underway. Prior to the trial, both parties engaged in public exchanges on the X platform, with OpenAI dismissing the lawsuit as baseless, while Elon Musk criticized Sam Altman, referring to him as 'Scam Altman.' The case centers on the controversy over OpenAI's transition to a for-profit model, with Musk accusing OpenAI of violating its original non-profit commitment. He is seeking up to $134 billion in damages, along with the reversal of the for-profit transition and the removal of relevant executives. The liability determination phase is expected to continue until mid-May.

data.title: Polymarket has a new listing: "Elon Musk wins at least $10 billion settlement with Altman/OpenAI".
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, a new stock listing on Polymarket, "Elon Musk Wins at Least $10 Billion Settlement with Altman/OpenAI," currently shows a 14% probability of being "yes." The contract rules state that if Elon Musk wins at least $10 billion in cash or equivalent compensation in the initial trial of his lawsuit against Altman (Case No. 4:24-cv-04722-YGR, U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California) through a jury verdict, court judgment, or settlement by 11:59 PM ET on December 31, 2026, the market will settle as "yes"; otherwise, it will settle as "no." If the case is lost, the initial trial fails to reach the compensation threshold, or the compensation is only non-monetary, it will be judged as "no," and the results of retrials and appeals will not be included in this market listing. The primary basis for the judgment will be official information from the U.S. court system, while also referencing consensus reports from credible media outlets. Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI went to trial on April 27th local time, initiating jury selection. Prior to the trial, the two sides escalated their public exchanges on the X platform, with OpenAI claiming the lawsuit was baseless, while Elon Musk repeatedly attacked Sam Altman, calling him "Scam Altman." The core of the case revolves around the controversy surrounding OpenAI's for-profit transformation. Elon Musk accuses OpenAI of violating its founding non-profit commitment and is seeking up to $134 billion in damages, while also demanding the reversal of the for-profit transformation and the dismissal of relevant executives. The determination of liability is expected to continue until mid-May. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: BitMart will launch Pharos (PROS)
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Pharos (PROS) on April 28th at 23:00 (UTC+8), with the PROS/USDT trading pair available. Pharos is an inclusive Layer 1 public chain built specifically for RealFi, integrating real-world assets, institutional capital, and decentralized finance into a programmable, borderless economy. It aims to make real-world financial assets accessible to everyone, bridging Web2 and Web3 to form a unified, transparent, and open digital financial city. Founded by the core management and engineering team of Ant Group, it adopts a DP4 deep parallel architecture (prototype testing achieved 130,000+ TPS), supports EVM + WASM dual virtual machine execution, and has built-in RWA tokenization and stablecoin infrastructure. It has received support from global traditional financial institutions such as Hack VC and Faction VC. The private mainnet officially launched on December 12, 2025.

data.title: Binance to Update Exchange Link Sub-Account Limits for Enhanced Compliance
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform will implement an update to the Binance Exchange Link, also known as Crypto-as-a-Service: Basic/Advanced, to set a sub-account limit for KYC-verified linkages per Link client's end user. This change is part of Binance's efforts to align platform-wide standards across its products and services, aiming to enhance compliance and security measures for all users.

Effective from 2026-04-29 00:00 (UTC), the maximum number of sub-accounts per KYC-verified user per Binance Exchange Link Client will be limited to five. This update is designed to streamline operations and ensure that compliance standards are uniformly applied across the platform. Despite this new limitation, Exchange Link clients will still have the option to request higher overall sub-account limits for their accounts if necessary. Additionally, clients can continue to create and manage sub-accounts as needed to onboard new users.

Existing sub-accounts and KYC linkages created before the effective date will remain unaffected by this change. However, if the KYC-to-sub-account limit has already been reached, no new sub-accounts may be linked to a verified KYC profile. This measure ensures that the transition to the new limit is smooth and does not disrupt current operations. For further information or assistance, clients are encouraged to contact their dedicated account manager or reach out to the Binance Link Team directly.
